race.comment: CALEANA (6) has put together back-to-back placings, the latest when half a length away in second over 1700m at this track. Tackling a deeper field this time but he is capable of running a bold race. CHAMPAGNE JENNI (1) ran a nice race at the first start for a new stable last time and has won second-up in the past. With a little improvement can take this out. CEREMONIOUS (7) got the confidence back at the picnics two back but backed that up in 62 grade here last start, when beaten in a photo. Include. IMPENDING SWAN (13) broke her maiden last start over 1620m at Donald, scoring by 1.3 lengths. Harder this time but still one to consider.
